title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Angel One Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Angel One Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Angel One Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Angel One Ventures Solutions:
Angel One Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One Ventures Solutions!
